title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Vacation Booking
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book my vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Leave is accrued at a rate of 1.67 days per month, beginning from your start date. To book your vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance. This allows for proper planning and ensures that your absence does not disrupt team operations. Once submitted, your manager will review the request and notify you of approval or any necessary adjustments within five business days. If you have any questions or need assistance with the booking process, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to check your leave balance before submitting a request to ensure you have enough accrued days.
